suites.title: Core CLI Representative Benchmark Suite
suites.description: Representative serialized subprocess benchmark suite for current shared-core CLI discovery, validation, routing, and sync flows.

commands.title: Workflow System Route Preview
commands.description: Preview the workflow route selected for a cross-pack workflow-system audit request.
argv: audit the workflow system across core and plan

commands.title: Workflow Role Query
commands.description: Query the governed workflow index for active workflow roles.

commands.title: Runtime Telemetry Standard Validation
commands.description: Validate one canonical engineering standard through the governed document-semantics path.

commands.title: Validate All Baseline
commands.description: Run the bounded repository validation baseline without acceptance reconciliation.
commands.notes: This is the heaviest command in the suite and uses fewer measured runs to keep the representative benchmark practical.

commands.title: Workflow Index Sync Preview
commands.description: Build the active workflow index through the plan-owned sync surface.

suites.notes: This suite is the canonical reusable-core benchmark baseline for current CLI workflows. It is serialized, subprocess-based, and intended for retained core benchmark records.
